KXBIG3GAME-26JUL12DALDMV-DAL.rules_primary: If Dallas Power wins the Dallas Power vs DMV Trilogy BIG3 basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXBIG3GAME-26JUL12DALDMV-DAL.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Dallas Power vs DMV Trilogy BIG3 basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026. If the cancelled game is not played or is rescheduled further than two weeks out, the market will resolve to a fair price for each team in accordance with the rules.
